restaurant.name: Buka Delight
restaurant.description: Authentic, energetic Nigerian cuisine delivered hot and fresh.

promos.title: TGIF Special!
promos.description: Order any main meal and show this promo to the waiter for a free chilled Malt.

promos.title: Weekend Jollof Fiesta
promos.description: 20% off all party Jollof combos this weekend only. Don't miss out!

promos.title: Small Chops Platter
promos.description: The perfect appetizer! Samosas, Spring Rolls, Puff-puff and Peppered meat.

combos.title: Jollof Party Combo
combos.description: Party Jollof Rice, Grilled Turkey, Plantain, Coleslaw, and a chilled Malt.

combos.title: Weekend Asun Special
combos.description: Spicy roasted goat meat with soft agege bread and a drink.

items.name: Smoky Party Jollof
items.description: Authentic firewood Jollof rice enriched with Nigerian spices.

items.name: Ofada Rice & Ayamase
items.description: Local Ofada rice served with spicy green pepper sauce and assorted meat.

items.name: Pounded Yam & Egusi
items.description: Smooth, fluffy pounded yam served with rich Egusi soup and dried fish.

items.name: Amala & Ewedu
items.description: Hot Amala served with Ewedu, Gbegiri, and spicy Buka stew.

items.name: Spicy Grilled Croaker
items.description: Whole croaker fish marinated in local spices and grilled to perfection.

items.name: Peppered Snail
items.description: Large snails sautéed in a fiery onion and habanero pepper mix.

items.name: Classic Small Chops
items.description: Mix of spring rolls, samosas, puff-puff, and peppered meat.

items.name: Chilled Zobo Drink
items.description: Refreshing hibiscus drink brewed with ginger and pineapple.
